content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market: Nifty -0.44%, Bank Nifty -1.21%, PSU Banks -2.62% but IT +1.47% and Pharma firm. India VIX rising +1.8% to 16.92 indicates elevated uncertainty. Several mid-caps in our book showing strong momentum on Q4 results. Late-session (14:40) so primary task is locking gains via SL trails on winners, not new entries. Book deeply diversified across 13 holdings already; deployment 61%.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.8% winner. Current SL 1068.30 is already above entry 984 — locked in solid gains. CMP 1083.60 — gap to SL ~1.4%, within 1% trail-gap floor concern. Holding existing SL (no further tightening to avoid self-stopout per Rule given gap already tight). HOLD existing levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge bouncing today +1.66%. SL 121 (-3.3% from CMP 124.19) appropriate. Geopolitical/Iran tail intact. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.3% intraday on Q4 strength + 2.7x volume; CMP 834. Trailing SL up from 820 (entry/breakeven) to 825 — locks small gain, gap to CMP ~1.1% (just above 1% floor). Target 855 unchanged (~+2.6% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.6% winner after Q4 +30% revenue, Encora deal, Cigniti merger May 16. Stock blew through original target 1420 (CMP 1366.20). Raising target to 1450 to give room — PL TP Rs 2,020 supports further upside. SL 1341.52 unchanged (trail-gap to CMP only 1.8%, already tight)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, faded from intraday high 3129 to CMP 3048.60. SL 3000 (-1.6% from CMP) already tight given +48% prior month rally and overbought conditions. No room to trail further without risking same-day stopout on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.1% with 7.4x volume surge. SL already at 825 — gap to CMP 838 ~1.6%, fine. Holding existing levels. No-op MODIFY avoided — emit HOLD logic."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5%, but stock rallied today +8.7% post Q4 (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps). Thesis intact. SL 1465 (-1.2% from CMP 1483) acceptable for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% but Q4 turnaround thesis strong (+317% PAT, +45% revenue, biotech +126%). SL 1580 (-1.6% from CMP 1605) reasonable. Thesis intact, no action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% post Q4 print, FY26 PAT +46.7%, refrigerant capex Rs 2,300 cr. SL 2755 (-1.3% from CMP 2790) tight; chart trying to break Bollinger upper. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4% on Q4 record print (W&C +30%, FMEG +47%, Rs 47/share dividend). SL 9020 (-0.8% from CMP 9093) too tight per 1% floor — but raising would require explicit MODIFY. Leaving as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, Q4 PAT down 17% YoY (Labour Codes one-time). Defence revenue +46% strong but US Class 8 truck cycle headwind real. SL 1955 (-1.3% from 1981) tight. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat +0.2%. SL 354 (-2.8% from CMP 364) reasonable. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie TP 415. Bank Nifty weak today (-1.2%) keeping NBFCs muted; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% but stock rallied to 10785 intraday post Q4 (PAT +34%, Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000). SL 10440 (-2.7% from CMP 10716) appropriate. Strong thesis, holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1068.30, "reasoning": "SL already locked in +8.6% gain; gap to CMP 1.4%."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Lock breakeven+ on Q4 strength."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1341.52, "reasoning": "Target raised to 1450 to give room past initial 1420."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "Already tight after extended rally."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Existing trail in place."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1465.00, "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact, SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Turnaround thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2755.00, "reasoning": "Q4 momentum, hold."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "Record Q4, holding."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Defence thesis intact despite Q4 PAT optics."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, NBFC under sector pressure today."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Q4 +34% PAT, buyback at 12,000, thesis intact."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "THERMAX (+13.83% to ATH on Q4) — extended after +38% monthly run, capital goods cluster (POLYCAB held + BHARATFORG held = 2 names) at cap, NO admit. LAURUSLABS — already have OPEN BUY @ 1226 (CMP 1229.10, near fill); not stacking. NUVAMA, GABRIEL, NBCC, FINCABLES, RAMCOCEM, APOLLOTYRE, DABUR (already pending), TATATECH, PERSISTENT — all skipped: book at 13 holdings + 3 pending orders is already at high diversification, cash 39% provides buffer; entries at 14:40 with 49 minutes to close offer poor price discovery on swing positions. HFCL pending order from 3474m ago (~58 hrs old) is stale — should consider canceling next session if still open.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 13 CNC positions deployed 61% — well-diversified across FMCG (MARICO), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA), IT (COFORGE), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, GRSE), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND), BFSI (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), Auto (BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO), Gold ETF. Today's unrealized +₹12,629 reflects strong Q4-driven moves (PNBHOUSING +10.8%, COFORGE +8.6%, CAMS +4.1%, MARICO +1.6%). Bank Nifty -1.21% and PSU Banks -2.62% argue caution on adding more financial exposure. India VIX rising +1.8% — late-day entries unattractive. Letting trails do the work; tomorrow's open offers better entry pricing if any names dip. Cumulative P&L turning back to positive (+₹10,801 starting capital +1.08%) — discipline paying off vs Day-12 panic-exit failure mode."
}
